_comment: Hand-derived (implementation-plan.md fixtures rule, WP-11), same envelope assumption as steps.json (see its _comment). base-knowledge.md §3 has no exact-name match for §5's bare 'Respiratory Rate' row (only 'Daily Respiratory Rate' and 'Respiratory Rate Sleep Summary' exist) -- CoreModel's GoogleDataType.writability already resolved this ambiguity to the sample-level `respiratoryRateSleepSummary` case (see GoogleDataType.swift's own doc comment and progress.md's WP-02 note), so this fixture uses that type. Value key `respiratory_rate_sleep_summary.breathsPerMinute` (field name assumed). Maps to HKQuantityTypeIdentifierRespiratoryRate, unit count/min (HealthKit has no dedicated breaths unit). Mirrored in SyncKit's TypeMapperFixtures.respiratoryRatePoint().
